description: Launch Tor Browser and create a bash script at /home/ga/Documents/tor_scraper.sh that uses the local SOCKS5 proxy (127.0.0.1:9150) to download https://check.torproject.org/api/ip to /home/ga/Documents/tor_ip.json and the DuckDuckGo onion site (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) to /home/ga/Documents/ddg_onion.html. The script must use remote DNS resolution via the proxy to ensure connectivity to .onion services. Execute the script to generate the required output files.
